    → You dominate their range. Raising extracts maximum value from a weaker story.

COACH (close_spot): You're on the Small Blind with A♠ A♥. Button opened to 3 BB — you're deciding whether to enter this pot. Their story: narrow range (~20% of hands). The math supports calling — you have enough equity against their estimated range. GTO is mixed here — call 50%, close spot.
